en: I commend to you our sister Phoebe, a servant of the church at Cenchreae,
zh: 我向你們推薦我們的姊妹非比；她是堅革里教會的執事。

en: that you may welcome her in the Lord in a way worthy of the saints, and help her in whatever she may need from you, for she has been a patron of many and of myself as well.
zh: 請你們在主裡用合乎聖徒身分的態度去接待她。無論她在甚麼事上有需要，請你們都幫助她；因為她曾經幫助許多人，也幫助了我。

en: Greet Prisca and Aquila, my fellow workers in Christ Jesus,
zh: 問候在基督耶穌裡與我同工的百基拉和亞居拉；

en: who risked their necks for my life, to whom not only I give thanks but all the churches of the Gentiles give thanks as well.
zh: 他們為了我的性命，置生死於度外，不但我感激他們，連外族的眾教會也感激他們。

en: Greet also the church in their house. Greet my beloved Epaenetus, who was the first convert to Christ in Asia.
zh: 也問候他們家裡的教會。問候我親愛的以拜尼妥，他是亞西亞省初結的果子。

en: Greet Mary, who has worked hard for you.
zh: 問候馬利亞，她為你們多多勞苦。

en: Greet Andronicus and Junia, my kinsmen and my fellow prisoners. They are well known to the apostles, and they were in Christ before me.
zh: 問候曾經與我一同被囚的親族安多尼古和猶尼亞；他們在使徒中是有名望的，也比我先在基督裡。

en: Greet Ampliatus, my beloved in the Lord.
zh: 問候在主裡我親愛的暗伯利。

en: Greet Urbanus, our fellow worker in Christ, and my beloved Stachys.
zh: 問候在基督裡與我們同工的珥巴努和我親愛的士達古。

en: Greet Apelles, who is approved in Christ. Greet those who belong to the family of Aristobulus.
zh: 問候在基督裡蒙稱許的亞比利。問候亞里斯多博家裡的人。

en: Greet my kinsman Herodion. Greet those in the Lord who belong to the family of Narcissus.
zh: 問候我的親族希羅天。問候拿其舒家中在主裡的人。

en: Greet those workers in the Lord, Tryphaena and Tryphosa. Greet the beloved Persis, who has worked hard in the Lord.
zh: 問候在主裡勞苦的土非拿和土富撒。問候親愛的彼息；她在主裡多多勞苦。

en: Greet Rufus, chosen in the Lord; also his mother, who has been a mother to me as well.
zh: 問候在主裡蒙揀選的魯孚和他的母親；她也是我在主裡的母親。

en: Greet Asyncritus, Phlegon, Hermes, Patrobas, Hermas, and the brothers who are with them.
zh: 問候亞遜其都、弗勒干、赫米、百羅巴、赫馬，以及和他們在一起的弟兄們。

en: Greet Philologus, Julia, Nereus and his sister, and Olympas, and all the saints who are with them.
zh: 問候非羅羅哥和猶利亞，尼利亞與他的姊妹和阿林巴，以及同他們在一起的眾聖徒。

en: Greet one another with a holy kiss. All the churches of Christ greet you.
zh: 你們要用聖潔的親吻彼此問安。基督的眾教會都問候你們。

en: I appeal to you, brothers, to watch out for those who cause divisions and create obstacles contrary to the doctrine that you have been taught; avoid them.
zh: 弟兄們，我勸你們要提防那些離間你們、絆倒你們、使你們違反你們所學的教義的人。你們也要避開他們，

en: For such persons do not serve our Lord Christ, but their own appetites, and by smooth talk and flattery they deceive the hearts of the naive.
zh: 因為這樣的人不服事我們的主基督，只服事自己的肚腹，用花言巧語欺騙老實人的心。

en: For your obedience is known to all, so that I rejoice over you, but I want you to be wise as to what is good and innocent as to what is evil.
zh: 你們的順服已經名聞各處，所以我為你們高興。我願你們在善事上有智慧，在惡事上毫不沾染。

en: The God of peace will soon crush Satan under your feet. The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
zh: 賜平安的 神快要把撒但踐踏在你們腳下。願我們主耶穌的恩惠與你們同在。

en: Timothy, my fellow worker, greets you; so do Lucius and Jason and Sosipater, my kinsmen.
zh: 我的同工提摩太和我的親族路求、耶遜和所西巴德都問候你們。

en: I Tertius, who wrote this letter, greet you in the Lord.
Gaius, who is host to me and to the whole church, greets you. Erastus, the city treasurer, and our brother Quartus, greet you.
zh: 那接待我也接待全教會的該猶，問候你們。本城的司庫以拉都和夸圖弟兄問候你們。
神能依照我所傳的福音和耶穌基督所傳的信息，照著他奧祕的啟示，堅定你們。這奧祕自古以來祕而不宣，

en: Now to him who is able to strengthen you according to my gospel and the preaching of Jesus Christ, according to the revelation of the mystery that was kept secret for long ages
zh: 但現在藉著眾先知所寫的，照著永恆的 神的諭旨，已經向萬國顯明出來，使他們相信而順服。

en: but has now been disclosed and through the prophetic writings has been made known to all nations, according to the command of the eternal God, to bring about the obedience of faith-
zh: 願榮耀藉著耶穌基督，歸給獨一全智的 神，直到永遠。阿們。

en: to the only wise God be glory forevermore through Jesus Christ! Amen.
